step_rationale: Clears oxidized LDL; atheroprotective via modified-lipoprotein targeting.
mechanism: IgM autoantibodies targeting oxidized lipoproteins suppress lipid retention and promote clearance of modified LDL, reducing plaque burden.

references.title: Oxidation-specific epitopes are major targets of innate immunity in atherothrombosis.
Protective role of natural IgM-producing B1a cells in atherosclerosis.
Atherogenesis and the humoral immune response to modified lipoproteins.
Oxidized LDL antibodies in treatment and risk assessment of atherosclerosis and associated cardiovascular disease.
